figures.caption: Figure 2: Efficiency comparison of different context lengths. (a) presents the first-token generation latency. (b) shows the per-token (interval) latency during decoding. (c) illustrates the GPU memory footprint of KV cache.

Figure 1: An overview of Latent-Condensed Attention (LCA). The history context is condensed into a compact set of representatives via group-wise conde sation in the latent space: semantic information is aggregated through weighted pooling of CKV , while positional information is preserved via anchor selection from KR. The recent context is retained in full fidelity without condensation.
